summary_one_line: ICC data-colorspace signature at offset 0x10 must be an unsupported tag so cmsChannelsOfColorSpace returns negative, taking the unsupported-space branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte data-colorspace signature in the ICC profile header (offset 0x10-0x13) must be a value that cmsGetColorSpace returns and that cmsChannelsOfColorSpace does not recognize, so nOutputChans is negative (< 0). Supported tags like 'RGB ' yield a positive channel count and miss the branch; an unsupported/unmapped signature drives nOutputChans negative.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry varied non-RGB colorspace tags at offset 0x10-0x16 ('MDHC'/'XYZ ', 'Luvl'/'Lab ', 'B.LR') and differing profile-class bytes at 0x0c-0x0f ('prtr' or zeroed vs 'mntr'), producing a ColorSpace whose channel lookup returns negative; the branch (nOutputChans < 0) TRUE side is taken (winner hitcount 3 on branch, resolved 9/10).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All five loser seeds carry the identical fixed signature '52 47 42 20' ("RGB ") at offset 0x10-0x13 and 'mntr' at 0x0c-0x0f, a fully supported colorspace whose channel count is positive, so nOutputChans < 0 is always FALSE; loser blocked 10/10 with branch hitcount 0.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP feedback. lcms compares the parsed colorspace signature against a fixed table of supported FOURCC literals; I2SRandReplace logs those comparison operands and splices the literal directly into the input bytes at the signature offset, letting vpc reach unsupported-signature values that flip nOutputChans negative. value_profile, having only Hamming-bucket gradient feedback and no I2S substitution, stays anchored to the seed's 'RGB ' signature.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked TRUE side guards an unsupported-colorspace early return driven by nOutputChans.
nOutputChans is the channel count of the profile's colorspace, derived from the parsed input.
Loser seeds carry a fixed supported 'RGB ' colorspace signature at the colorspace offset.
Winner seeds carry varied non-RGB colorspace signatures at the same offset while losers are concentrated on R.
All loser-blocking seeds share the identical RGB XYZ header layout taking the false branch.
At the blocker branch the winner takes the true side while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L3851  T=4 F=4  T=0 F=20  if (nOutputChans < 0) return 0;  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog uniquely adds I2SRandReplace substitution over value_profile.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, so it cannot splice colorspace literals.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2232 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0cae0d2f5478842f`; the ancestor chain has 16 levels and the tool reports the I2S-floor signal: 1 dash row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 15, the floor-signal for an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: If value_profile (no I2S) also resolves the branch at a comparable rate when given only a positive-channel 'RGB ' seed — i.e. CMP_MAP gradient alone reaches an unsupported colorspace signature without I2S substitution — the I2S attribution is wrong.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether cmsChannelsOfColorSpace actually returns a negative value for the winner's specific tags is inferred from the branch hit divergence rather than shown directly in source; the exact unsupported-signature-to-negative mapping is not in the prompt.
